MBSA ZONING APPROVAL

Issuing Authority: Majlis Bandaraya Shah Alam (MBSA)
Property Address: 12 Jalan Demo, Seksyen 7, 40000 Shah Alam, Selangor
Zoning Designation: Mixed residential-commercial (R3/C2)
Plot Ratio: 1:4 (approved)
Issued: 18 November 2025

This approval certifies that the development at the above address conforms
to the approved Rancangan Tempatan Daerah (RTD) 2023 for Seksyen 7 and
is zoned for mixed residential and commercial use. The approval remains
valid for the duration of the current structure plan.

Certifying Officer: Pegawai Perancang Bandar Kanan
Stamp: Jabatan Perancangan Pembangunan MBSA
